patch:
commit ac75171d41f0000d53eadf64a943d6fabc24af6c
Author: Nikita Popov <npopov@redhat.com>
Date:   Tue Nov 21 15:44:56 2023 +0100

    [InstCombine] Fix incorrect nneg inference on shift amount
    
    Whether this is valid depends on the bit widths of the involved
    integers.
    
    Fixes https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/72927.

diff --git a/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineCasts.cpp b/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineCasts.cpp
index 1b2615d4598d..d2c6ffe9001d 100644
--- a/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineCasts.cpp
+++ b/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineCasts.cpp
@@ -1223,7 +1223,9 @@ Instruction *InstCombinerImpl::visitZExt(ZExtInst &Zext) {
 
   if (!Zext.hasNonNeg()) {
     // If this zero extend is only used by a shift, add nneg flag.
-    if (Zext.hasOneUse() && SrcTy->getScalarSizeInBits() > 2 &&
+    if (Zext.hasOneUse() &&
+        SrcTy->getScalarSizeInBits() >
+            Log2_64_Ceil(DestTy->getScalarSizeInBits()) &&
         match(Zext.user_back(), m_Shift(m_Value(), m_Specific(&Zext)))) {
       Zext.setNonNeg();
       return &Zext;

tests.test_body:
define i129 @shift_zext_not_nneg(i8 %arg) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @shift_zext_not_nneg(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[EXT:%.*]] = zext i8 [[ARG:%.*]] to i129
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SHL:%.*]] = shl nuw i129 1, [[EXT]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i129 [[SHL]]
  %ext = zext i8 %arg to i129
  %shl = shl i129 1, %ext
  ret i129 %shl
}

define i128 @shift_zext_nneg(i8 %arg) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @shift_zext_nneg(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[EXT:%.*]] = zext nneg i8 [[ARG:%.*]] to i128
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SHL:%.*]] = shl nuw i128 1, [[EXT]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i128 [[SHL]]
  %ext = zext i8 %arg to i128
  %shl = shl i128 1, %ext
  ret i128 %shl
}

issue.title: Miscompilation - results change at -O1
issue.body:
Demonstration: https://godbolt.org/z/jMseT9fW7

LLVM IR that seems to miscompile:
```
define i64 @__sample__main(i8 %x1, ptr %output_ptrs) {
entry:
  %0 = zext i8 %x1 to i256
  %1 = shl nuw i256 1, %0
  %2 = load ptr, ptr %output_ptrs, align 8
  %3 = zext i256 %1 to i1024
  %4 = shl nsw nuw i1024 %3, 8
  %5 = zext i8 %x1 to i1024
  %6 = or i1024 %4, %5
  store i1024 %6, ptr %2, align 16
  ret i64 0
}
```
issue.author: ericastor

comments.author: nikic
comments.body: InstCombine perform this incorrect transform (with somewhat reduced bit widths): https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/gxTdgd

comments.author: nikic
comments.body:
Minimized: https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/TZhFZN
```
define i256 @src(i8 %arg) {
  %ext = zext i8 %arg to i256
  %shl = shl i256 1, %ext
  ret i256 %shl
}
```
We cannot assume that the shift amount is nneg here...
